lines: Stories are like dreams we share with our friends.
Tell me a story about your adventures, {player}.
quest_offer_line: I'm writing a new comic book but I'm stuck on a page. Will you help me, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Kaboom! Zap! This is getting exciting! Keep going, {player}!
quest_complete_line: A masterpiece! You're a brilliant storyteller and illustrator, {player}.
